originalTitle: 1M FPS mini-DoTA/LoL for reinforcement learning. Dev day #7
title: Optimizing MOBA Simulator to 1M+ FPS and Beginning RL Integration
summary: Worked on performance optimization of the game simulation, implementing caching and data structure changes to achieve over 1 million steps per second single-threaded. Then began integrating with PyTorch policies and multi-environment vectorization, achieving 600-800k training steps per second.
